role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Analyzed Arabic script and signage layout, staying within linguistic scope.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on limestone cladding, climate, and urban density, appropriate for landscape.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified xeric shrubs and conifers, correctly limiting claims to general biome/urban landscaping.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road signs (No Entry) and infrastructure, though also leaned on architectural cues.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (bus design, utility poles) effectively.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Jordan. The specialist assessments were generally high quality, with the landscape and meta agents providing the strongest differentiating evidence (limestone, bus style). The linguistic agent was weak due to the non-discriminatory nature of Arabic script, but this was compensated for by other agents.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described limestone buildings and dusty environment.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified 'No Entry' sign and bus.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified bus color and utility poles.
